allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=['expo','react','react-native','react-native-reanimated','react-native-gesture-handler','react-native-screens','react-native-safe-area-context','@react-navigation/native','@react-navigation/bottom-tabs','@react-navigation/stack','react-native-draggable-flatlist','expo-linear-gradient','expo-image-picker']; [print\(f'{p}: {d[\\"packages\\"][\\"node_modules/\\"+p][\\"version\\"]}'\) for p in pkgs if 'node_modules/'+p in d['packages']]")
PowerShell(npm view expo-notifications versions --json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object { $_ -match "^0\\.\(28|29\)\\." } | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" shell am start -W -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d "exp+neurotrackrn://expo-development-client/?url=http%3A%2F%2F192.168.1.167%3A8081" com.mrbadinfluence.NeuroTrack)

PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" shell am start -W -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d "exp+neurotrackrn://expo-development-client/?url=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A8081" com.mrbadinfluence.NeuroTrack)
PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" shell pm list packages | Select-String "neurotrack")
PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" shell pm list packages | Select-String "mrbad")
